title: onosma trachyantha
intro: Onosma trachyantha, also known as the golden ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Onosma trachyantha include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Onosma trachyantha include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
